summary: Caffeine app with Google Analytics integration
architectural_notes: Google Analytics tracking being integrated for traffic monitoring
known_issues: Google Analytics shows URL as invalid - needs tracking code verification

new_feature_requests.summary: Review and fix Google Analytics implementation without affecting user experience
Verify that Google Analytics tracking code is properly installed in the frontend HTML with correct GA4 tracking ID format (G-XXXXXXXXXX)
Ensure the tracking implementation includes the full HTTPS URL format for the Internet Computer deployment domain
Verify that no user-visible UI elements or functionality are affected by the Analytics implementation review
